summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the expanded Ads Gupta Ecosystem. All major features are working perfectly including Enhanced Neural Assistant chatbot, Commerce Intel Module, Multi-Stakeholder Solutions Grid, and Blog page with required headlines.

Chatbot provides contextual responses to quick actions
Commerce Intel section displays with Amazon/Walmart/Target badges
All Commerce Intel features present: Predictive Bidding & Dayparting, Inventory-Synchronized Ads, Full-Funnel Onsite Display
Commerce Intel stats correct: 340% ROAS, 2.1M+ SKUs, 98% Accuracy
Multi-Stakeholder Grid shows all 3 categories: Demand-Side, Supply-Side, Social/Influencer
Demand-Side features: Programmatic RTB and Enterprise DSP Tools working
Supply-Side features: Publisher Yield and SSP Integrations working
Social/Influencer features: Automated Creator Matching and Viral Marketing Engine working
Blog page has all required headlines: Authenticity, Rural Sakhi Effect, Neural-Pathing, Amazon & Walmart Advantage
Blog trending topics bar functional with all expected topics
Design consistency maintained: #121212 background, cyan accents, Space Grotesk font usage across all pages
Dark Mode Luxury Tech design maintained throughout application
